executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 200 threat advisories. Of these, 39 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 9 as HIGH risk. 2 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors
